response.justification: Bogdan has the raw years of experience and a genuinely broad technical background, but the role calls for recognized, deep AI expertise and a strategic advisory track record — neither of which the resume demonstrates. His AI work began only in April 2025 and is implementation-level (MCP tooling, agentic frameworks), not the kind of thought-leadership, platform-scale AI work the role requires. The seniority framing is also a gap: there is no evidence of Director-level IC scope, advising strategic customers, or driving cross-organizational AI strategy.
strengths: 20 years of diverse engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput distributed systems — well above the 15-year minimum
Genuine entrepreneurial streak: founder of GISCollective and a history of open-source tooling and community workshops
Current hands-on involvement with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq signals awareness of the agentic AI space
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent — the only AI work listed started in April 2025, with no prior ML/AI products, publications, or platforms
No evidence of strategic advisory, executive-level influence, or thought leadership at the scale the role demands
Education and title trajectory (Senior → Staff Software Developer) do not reflect the Director-level IC seniority the role expects; no advanced degree in an AI-related field
